title: Restore CWV "good" status — INP failing the 200ms threshold
description: Audit main-thread JS on tap interactions. Defer the chat widget and analytics tags. Break long tasks. Likely culprits: third-party tags blocking the main thread on click handlers.
businessOutcome: Failing INP is a confirmed Google ranking signal for mobile search. With 130+ facility pages competing in local-pack searches, every position matters.
evidence: CrUX field data, 2026-05-29: p75 INP = 207ms (threshold for "good" = 200ms).

title: Cut TTFB from 1170ms to <500ms
description: Add Cloudflare full-page cache for marketing pages. If origin is the bottleneck, move closer to SE-US users (16-state Southeast-heavy portfolio).
estimate: ~4 hrs config / ~1 day if rearchitecting hosting
businessOutcome: TTFB is 65% of the LCP budget. Halving it puts LCP comfortably under 1.5s — measurable lift in Google rankings and rental funnel conversion.
evidence: CrUX field data, 2026-05-29: p75 TTFB = 1170ms (threshold for "good" = 800ms).

title: Replace deprecated browser API
description: Lighthouse flagged 1 deprecation warning in the page's JS bundle. Identify and replace.
evidence: Lighthouse audit, 2026-05-29, mobile: best-practices score 81/100, 1 deprecation warning.

title: Fix accessible-name mismatch on labeled element
description: One element's visible text label doesn't match its accessible name (aria-label or alt). Causes screen-reader confusion.
businessOutcome: Screen reader UX. Drops a Lighthouse failure.

title: Ship 5 Special Features detail pages
description: Replace the dead megamenu links (24/7 Access, Security Systems, Contactless Move-In, Month-to-Month Lease, Online Management) with SEO-targeted detail pages.
businessOutcome: Trust signals drive the rental decision. Today the links 404; tomorrow they're ranking for "secure storage near me" and similar long-tail queries.
evidence: Manual audit of 10federalstorage.com/why-choose-10-federal-storage — all 5 Special Features links non-functional.

title: Unify customer portal experience across all 5 sub-brands
description: Today the flagship (10 Federal Storage) is white-labeled at facility.10federalstorage.com; the other 4 still show *.tenantconnect.com URLs. Fix: (a) CNAMEs for Storage Depot / Big Guy / Carolina Secure / SS Max portals, (b) default landing to "Existing Customers" (move auction-buyer + vendor links to secondary menu), (c) fix broken chat widget config, (d) brand-specific theming.
businessOutcome: Customer portal friction = inbound call volume to the (910) number. Broken chat on a billing portal is a trust erosion signal across every billing cycle. One configuration sprint compounds across the entire portfolio — pure leverage.
evidence: Manual portal audit, 2026-05-29: pixel-identical TenantConnect pages across all 5 sub-brands, only flagship has CNAME, chat widget non-functional on all.
